strengths: 15+ years of full-stack systems architecture with proven ability to scale systems handling millions of transactions and high-throughput microservices
Strong testing and code quality culture demonstrated through testing library creation, TDD workshops, and consistent software craftsmanship advocacy
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure experience with MCP code generators and agentic frameworks, directly addressing emerging technical requirements
concerns: No explicit evidence of Nest.js or Vitest proficiency despite being primary stack; unclear if hands-on framework experience exists or ramp-up needed
Limited evidence of security and authentication expertise — no mentions of OAuth, JWT, authorization patterns, or security best practices implementation
Recent employment instability with 6-month tenure at latest role followed by career gap beginning October 2025; circumstances and engagement type unclear
response.justification: Szabo brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering with strong demonstrated ability to scale complex systems, complemented by hands-on AI agent infrastructure experience. However, gaps in primary framework proficiency (Nest.js, Vitest) and security best practices create uncertainty about immediate productivity in key areas. His strong code quality and craftsmanship culture align well with role expectations, though recent brief tenure and employment gaps warrant clarification.
